calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-049 Phase 2 hybrid encoder behavioural validation (V3-EXQ-514 successor)
items.notes: V3-EXQ-514 successor with three fixes for the FAIL-on-instrumentation outcome: (A) higher contact rate via env tuning (size=8, num_resources=15, num_hazards=0, longer episodes 300, resource_respawn_on_consume=True) targeting >= 1% contact rate vs V3-EXQ-514's 0.07%; (B) dense neighborhood-dominant-type probe (sampled at every step, labeled by argmax over per-type field views) replacing the consumption-only probe that suffered from <2-unique-classes silent zeroing; (C) classifier_loss_weight=0.1 keeping the verdict's Option C trunk-shaping commitment but calibrating against the much-larger E1/E3/prox losses to prevent joint-training divergence. 9 acceptance criteria; PASS lifts SD-049 Phase 2 + SD-015 promotable. FAIL on probe_acc_neighborhood + sufficient samples = architectural Phase 2 issue (verdict.md row 2/3); FAIL on C1b only = lower classifier_loss_weight in 514b; FAIL across ARM_2 AND ARM_3 = substrate-ceiling falsifier (verdict.md row 6, V4-1 routing).

items.title: SD-051 conditioned safety store readiness with synthetic harm injection (V3-EXQ-519 successor)
items.notes: V3-EXQ-519 C6 FAIL root cause: deterministic cycling actions + untrained AffectiveHarmEncoder produces z_harm_a.norm near-constant at encoder-bias floor (~0.41); SufferingDerivativeComparator drop_threshold=0.08 never met (delta<0.001). Fix: ARM_A injects synthetic harm_obs_a (ones*0.6 ticks 0-19, zeros tick 20+) to test MECH-302->ConditionedSafetyStore wiring without depending on behavioral dynamics. ARM_B uses constant-high injection (no drop -> no event, verifying the drop condition is required). Also lowers suffering_drop_threshold to 0.05 and suffering_min_initial_norm to 0.02. Dry-run PASS 2026-05-04: 4 relief events, peak_signal=0.982, all C1-C9 pass.
